reviews.title: Disappointing Stay – Not Worth the Money
reviews.text:
I had high expectations for this hotel, given its brand reputation, but my experience was deeply disappointing.

- No bellboy service, guests must carry their own luggage.
- Conveniently located near a mall, but heavy weekend traffic makes driving here a hassle.
- The overall cleanliness was okay, but finding hair in the food was unacceptable.
- The staff struggled to resolve booking and facilities issues.
- Several facilities were in poor condition, including a broken bathroom door and a faulty EV charger. 
- Maintenance work caused unpleasant smells in the parking area.

While I understand the hotel is newly opened, it is clear they are not yet ready to accommodate guests properly. I hope improvements are made in the future, but my stay was far from satisfactory.

reviews.title: A wonderful stay
reviews.text:
We stayed here for a week in November. The location is excellent and right next to Icon Siam, one of the best shopping plazas in Bangkok.
Every single interaction with staff was delightful; kind, courteous and genuinely caring. We had breakfast in the buffet each morning. The food selection had something for every taste. What they may not have had, you needed to only ask the diligent and attentive staff and the kitchen provided it for you.
This is one of the best hotel experiences I've ever had and I will definitely return here on my next visit. Thank you Hilton Garden Inn Riverside. 🙏

reviews.title: Fire alarm after midnight
reviews.text:
Small room but comfy and clean. Maybe don’t bother booking the river view room because the view will be largely obstructed by the monstrosity that is Iconsiam’s roadside facade. TV is not a smart one. No coffee machine nor bathrobe but you get clothes iron.  Pool is super small it’s a joke. Lovely staff and excellent value happy hour. 

During my stay there was an emergency evacuation alarm after midnight. It’s a rather tall building so it could be a real problem for older guests to walk down the fire exit stairs. What is unacceptable though is when I reached the ground floor, there was no staff member there to explain the situation or give us any further instructions. It took a long while for a single hotel staff to appear and tell a large crowd of guests it was a false alarm. At the end of the day, it’s good that there was no real emergency, but the way they manage the situation left me thinking how worse the situation could have been if there were a real fire. No compensation offered also.

reviews.title: Need improvement
reviews.text:
Location is great and convenient. However, the service quality needs improvement, as the staff professionalism was disappointing.

The most unacceptable experience was the fire alarm going off in the middle of the night, only to be told later that it was a “test.” This should have been communicated properly in advance.

Check-in was also extremely slow. After requesting a room change, the new room key wasn’t even activated, so I had to go back downstairs again to fix the issue.

Overall, the location is the main advantage, but the service and operational efficiency need significant improvement.

reviews.title: Not Worth the Price for a Hilton Brand
reviews.text:
I booked Hilton Garden Inn Bangkok expecting comfort and good service, but the experience was far below what I imagined from a Hilton property.

First, the swimming pool was out of order, which was disappointing as it was one of the main reasons I chose this hotel. The rooms are very small, much smaller than what you would expect for the price and the Hilton name. To add to the frustration, there was no bell boy service. I was traveling with my 1-year-old child and two heavy bags, yet I had to carry everything myself both during check-in and check-out. For a hotel under the Hilton brand, this was shocking.

The 1,000 Baht security deposit policy also doesn’t make sense. If something is damaged or missing, it can be settled at checkout, but forcing every guest to pay upfront is unnecessary. Since I didn’t have cash, I had to use my credit card, and although they promised a refund, it’s been 4 days and I still haven’t received it. A professional hotel should process refunds instantly, not make guests wait for days.

On the positive side, the breakfast was good, but unfortunately that was the only satisfying part of my stay.

Overall, this hotel does not provide value for money. With broken facilities, small rooms, poor service, and outdated policies, I would not recommend Hilton Garden Inn Bangkok to families or travelers expecting the Hilton standard.

reviews.title: Good Brand new hotel in Bangkok
reviews.text:
We spent three nights at this brand-new hotel and had a fantastic experience overall. Everything from the rooms to the gym and swimming pool is new and well-maintained. Although we didn’t use the pool, we visited the gym a few times. The gym is quite small and has limited equipment, which may not suit everyone’s workout needs. Similarly, the buffet breakfast offers only a modest selection, with limited variety.

The hotel is conveniently located in the same building as ICS Mall and right next to Icon Siam Mall. It’s easily accessible via BTS, with a direct ride to the interchange station, or alternatively, you can take a river taxi to the nearest interchange.

reviews.title: A convenient hotel for sightseeing by the riverside.
reviews.text:
It is a riverside hotel located behind Iconsiam, connected to the railway station. Taking a tourist boat to visit riverside temples such as Wat Arun and Wat Pho is a typical way to enjoy Bangkok. The area around the hotel has many affordable massage shops, which I think you should definitely try. The hotel has a new and sleek design, and the sofa by the window is relaxing. The hotel entrance is not easy to find, but if you locate the ICS shopping mall across from Iconsiam, it is connected, making it easier to spot. I think it would be good to meet at the entrance of ICS for Grab.

You can reach the popular Wat Mahathat by taxi for about 150 baht. I highly recommend it.

reviews.title: Prime location
reviews.text:
We stayed for three nights and booked three twin rooms. The location is great, as the 2nd floor connects directly to the ICS mall. Just a short walk on the 2nd floor leads to Iconsiam mall. 

There are many massage shops nearby on the lower level. The rooms are clean, but one of them had a smell from the new decor that hadn’t dissipated yet. The single beds are large and of medium softness, easily accommodating two people. Breakfast and the pool are on the 9th floor and are rich and delicious. Compared to the indifference of the front desk (perhaps due to communication issues?), the attitude of the restaurant staff was very friendly and polite. 
Overall, the location is excellent and offers great value for money.

reviews.text:
The hotel was very comfortable and clean. Access and location was very convenient. The hotel is linked to the charoen nakhon train station on the gold line and also to the icon Siam mall. The mall is high end but there are many food options at the basement of the mall. There are plenty of massage options on the right and left of the hotel with good rates..

Only issue on the day we landed, it took 1.5 hours to reach the hotel because of traffic. Hence try to use public transport where possible. To access boats, the pier and tickets are located at the other end of the icon Siam mall - you will have to walk all the way thru the basement to get there.

reviews.title: Modern Comfort
reviews.text:
**Staff & Service:
Exceptional hospitality! The staff were professional, friendly, and made the check-in/out process seamless.
• Pro-tip: They require a small cash deposit upon check-in. Keep your receipt safe to ensure a quick refund when you depart.

**Perfect Location:
While not right on the riverbank, it’s just a short walk away. The hotel is directly connected to the BTS Gold Line (Charoen Nakhon Station), making it incredibly easy to get around Bangkok.
Integrated Convenience (ICS & ICONSIAM):
The hotel is part of the ICS Tower. You can conveniently walk through the back of the parking area to access the BTS and ICONSIAM. (M floor)
• ICS Mall Highlights: Features a Lotus’s Privé (premium supermarket), a variety of famous restaurants, and >>> Siriraj Hospital Solutions (medical/wellness center).
>>> Bonus: There is a 24-hour 7-Eleven in the same building—perfect for late-night needs.

The Room:
Clean, modern, and very quiet. The bed was extremely comfortable, and the room is well-equipped with plenty of USB/power outlets, an iron, and a spacious bathroom.
 I also appreciated the carpeted hallways, which effectively minimized outside noise.

Dining & Facilities:
• Breakfast: A great variety and high-quality spread.
• 9th Floor: Don't miss the pleasant restaurant on the 9th floor.
• Amenities: The gym and pool are compact but well-maintained and clean. High-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout the property.

Overall:
A fantastic choice for those seeking comfort, great service, and easy access to shopping and transport. I would definitely stay here again!

reviews.title: Amazing stay!
reviews.positives: All staff were amazing. Top level service. Loved the breakfast and the view where the breakfast is served. Beds, linen and pillows were so comfortable. Hotel and facilities were very clean and what you’d expect from a Hilton brand. Location was extremely convenient. Connected to ICONSIAM shopping center and to the BTS. 7-11 is a few feet from the entrance. Loved my short stay after doing a dinner cruise and going through ICONSIAM mall a few feet to get to the hotel afterwards. No need to grab a taxi. Love it!

reviews.title: Very Good Stay
reviews.text:
We as family of 4 pax stayed for 6 nights - 2 interconnecting rooms. From check in onwards, the reception staff were extremely polite & helpful & the house keeping very courteous. There was a problem with the air con in one of the room for 2 nights - the reception & manageress were so so apologetic about it. They managed to fixed it the second night. In return, they insisted a complimentary dinner for us. It's a very nice gesture which we did not expect. During checked out, the manageress personally apologise again - which we replied there no need as they do not expect it to happened & they did resolve the issue.
As for the location of the hotel - it's basically "connected" to Iconsiam. It's so convenient. This hotel is close to many attractions such as Chinatown, Grand Palace, Wan Arun by means of short trip ferry situated behind Iconsiam facing the Chao Phraya. Talk about convenience.
When one gets tired shopping in Iconsiam, one could just walk back to the hotel so close by to rest.
As for the hotel breakfast, there is quite a lot varieties and food replenished quickly.
We checked out early at 5.30am - the hotel even managed to prepare the simple takeaway breakfast for us. 
That's is great service.
If one managed to get a room facing iconsiam & the river, one would be able to see the beautiful sunrise - if weather permits. 
Really appreciate the Thailand Hospitality & friendliness. It makes us feel really welcome.
This hotel is highly recommended. 
The Supervisor *** deserved a mentioned.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Stayed at Hilton Garden Inn Riverside Bangkok and had a really great experience overall.

The location is definitely one of the best parts—right next to the river and just a short walk to ICONSIAM, which made everything super convenient. It was easy to get around, and the views from the hotel were really nice, especially in the evening.

The room was clean, modern, and comfortable. You can tell the hotel is well maintained, and housekeeping did a great job. The bed was very comfortable, and the whole space felt fresh and relaxing. (Tripadvisor)

Service was another highlight. The staff were friendly, attentive, and made check-in and the whole stay smooth. A lot of guests also mentioned how welcoming and helpful the team is, which I completely agree with. (Tripadvisor)

Facilities like the pool and gym were nice, and I liked that the hotel is directly connected to a mall, so food and shopping options are just downstairs. (Wanderlog)

Breakfast was decent with a good variety, though there’s still some room for improvement in terms of selection. (Tripadvisor)

Overall, it’s a clean, comfortable, and well-located hotel that offers great value for money. I would definitely stay here again when visiting Bangkok!

reviews.title: Best Hotel i’ve ever stayed in
reviews.text:
Tops the list of hotels have stayed in for me. Can’t fault it in any way. Breakfast is of good variety and the rooms are lovely. Small pool and gym but i’m not using either so doesn’t matter to me. Can’t fault location and once u actually get your bearings and find the pier!  it’s easy. The mall is huge and a little bit overwelming at first. 
U have to pay a security deposit with a credit card only (no revolut or wise) or cash so make sure u have cash before u try and check in!

Wir hatten 3 Kinder dabei und wären froh gewesen, wenn uns jemand geholfen hätte. In allen anderen Hotels die sogar in der unteren Preisklasse lagen gab es immer Hilfe beim Koffer auf das Zimmer bringen oder abholen bei Abreise. In der Umgebung haben wir  leider keine Restaurants oder ähnlich zum Essen gehen gefunden, nur einen überteuerten Italiener oder im viel zu vollen Einkaufszentrum. Zimmer sind recht klein, kein Balkon, Raucherbereich weit weg.

reviews.title: best shopping location
reviews.text:
hotel is right next to the recently build iconsiam shopping centre, i big & luxurious shopping centre with several restaurants and even a night market in the basement floor. it also has a much smaller shopping centre next to the hotel with tesco lotus in the basement.

the hotel is also high quality, very friendly staff, every facility of the hotel is in good condition and while the room are quite small, they are very comforting with a good view over bangkok. the hotel became the new mainstay hotel for us. see you soon again :-).

reviews.title: Top
reviews.positives:
Wenn man das Wort „Garden“ hört, denkt man an riesige Flächen. Die Zimmer hier haben eher die Größe eines sehr gut organisierten Handgepäcks. 😄
Aber ganz ehrlich: klein, ja – dafür extrem sauber und clever eingerichtet. Kein Staubkorn hatte eine Chance.

Der Ausblick? Absolut mega. Diese Skyline am Abend ist Kino. Ich stand länger am Fenster als im Zimmer selbst – lohnt sich!

Direkte Verbindung zum Shopping Center ist Gold wert. Runter mit dem Lift, rein ins Konsum-Paradies. Gefährlich für die Kreditkarte, perfekt für die Stimmung.

Der Pool… nun ja. Sagen wir so: Wer Bahnen schwimmen will, sollte vorher üben, auf der Stelle zu paddeln. Er ist eher „Instagram-tauglich“ als olympisch – und leider viel im Schatten. Zum Abkühlen reicht’s, Sonnenanbeter müssen kreativ werden.

Das Personal? Richtig gut geschult, freundlich und professionell. Man merkt, dass hier Service ernst genommen wird.

Fazit:
Kleine Zimmer, große Skyline-Show, perfekte Shopping-Anbindung und starkes Team. Wer keinen Riesenpool erwartet, bekommt hier ein sehr solides Stadthotel mit Humor-Potenzial. Ich würde wiederkommen – allein schon für den Ausblick

reviews.title: Clean, New, Impressive

Staff are all friendly, and the breakfast menu is good, mainly chinese and western cuisine. The water pressure in the shower was also strong, and they already provide shampoo/conditioner/body wash. Will definitely book this hotel again in the future.

Most importantly, the shower cream smells really nice; the fresh orange scent makes me want to take it home. If I go to Icon Siam again, I will definitely stay here again.

reviews.title: The employees are professional.
reviews.text:
Impressed and attentive to service, fulfilling requests such as a high floor with a river view to make my child's birthday special.

It turned out that the hotel provided a birthday card and a cake with fruit as a surprise in the room.

I requested additional blankets and pillows, and the response was, "Of course, we're happy to help."
Teamwork was excellent, and the housekeeping staff delivered promptly.

The hotel is clean and close to Icon Siam, with a connecting path from the M floor of the hotel that allows walking between buildings, providing privacy and safety with a key card system.

The price is affordable, making it suitable for a relaxing getaway with dining and activities all in one place. I will definitely visit again.

Thank you to all the hotel staff!

reviews.title: โรงแรมติดไอคอนสยาม
reviews.text:
เลือกโรงแรมนี้เพราะอยู่ติดห้างไอคอนสยาม โลเคชันดีมาก ออกจากโรงแรมไปไอคอนสยามแป๊บเดียวถึง 
ตอนไปถึงยังไม่ถึงเวลาเช็คอินเลยฝากกระเป๋าไว้ก่อนแล้วออกไปเที่ยว สต๊าฟแจ้งว่าถ้าห้องเสร็จจะโทรบอก แล้วก็โทรมาบอกจริงๆ ใส่ใจมาก ขอบคุณสต๊าฟ Jay กับ Pook ที่ช่วยดูแลค่ะ 
ห้องที่จองเป็นแบบสองเตียงเดี่ยว ตอนเช็คอินสต๊าฟบอกจะพยายามหาห้องตามรีเควสคือชั้นสูงๆ ให้ หรือใกล้เคียงที่สุด สรุปได้ห้องชั้น 15 ก็ถือว่าสูงสำหรับเรา และที่เพิ่มมาคือวิวฝั่งแม่น้ำด้วย วิวจากห้องเห็นห้างไอคอนสยามกับแม่น้ำเจ้าพระยา
ห้องที่ได้ก็สวย ใหม่ สะอาด ผ้าม่านปิดทึบไม่มีแสงลอด ของใช้ครบครันมาก มีที่กว้างปลายเตียงมากพอจะยืนรีดผ้าแบบกางโต๊ะรีด ชอบตรงนี้ค่ะ 
สรุปคือเป็นโรงแรมที่ประทับใจมาก นอนหลับสนิทยาวเจ็ดชั่วโมงเลย แนะนำค่ะ

reviews.title: PERFECT STAY IN BANGKOK
reviews.text:
I had a truly enjoyable stay at this hotel, and one of the best things about it is that it’s directly connected to ICONSIAM Mall – super convenient for shopping, dining, and sightseeing without needing to travel far!

A big shoutout to Mr. Gun for his excellent service. He assisted me with a lot of patience during the check-in process, as I had just arrived from Malaysia and needed help retrieving my booking. He was professional, polite, and communicated clearly – a true asset to the hotel team.

The lobby was beautiful and had a lovely fragrance that made us feel instantly welcome. We stayed in a twin room with a city view, and I highly recommend it! The view of Bangkok is stunning, both at night and in the morning.

The breakfast buffet was also impressive – the noodle soup was my personal favorite, and all the Thai dishes were delicious. The staff during breakfast were attentive, well-mannered, and carried themselves with elegance. They truly deserve recognition for their amazing service.

Overall, everything from location to hospitality was perfect. I would definitely return and highly recommend this hotel to anyone visiting Bangkok – especially if you want easy access to ICONSIAM Mall!

reviews.title: 특히 방콕 첫 여행자들에게 추천하며 최고의 호텔입니다
reviews.positives:
방콕 최고의 호텔! 한국인 여행자들에게 강력추천합니다. 
1. 최고의 위치. 호텔 M층이 ICS-지하철역(bts)-아이콘시암 건물과 연결되어 있어서 호텔 방에서 아이콘시암 건물까지 걸어서 2분
또한 수상버스 탑승장 아이콘시암역이 있어서 차이나타운, 왓아룬, 방콕왕궁 등 주요 관광지까지 수상버스 타고 다 갈 수 있어서 매우 편리해요. 택시 이용 안 함
2. 조식이 정말 맛있고 저렴함. 현장결제시 1인당 한화 2만원/ 태국 420바트인데 커리, 오믈렛, 야채볶음, 빵, 시리얼, 커피까지 전부 다 맛있어요. 3일 연속으로 먹었는데 배부르게 맛있게 잘 먹었어요. 
3. 새 건물, 새 수도관이라 물이 깨끗해요. 샤워기 필터 써도 색이 거의 안 변해요. 
4. 침대 매트리스가 정말 좋고 편안합니다. 우리 집에서 자는 것보다 더 푹 잘 수 있었어요 :) 베개도 넓고 낮아서 편해요
reviews.negatives:
1. 에어컨 용량 큰게 설치되어있는지, 너무 세요. 27도 약풍으로 틀어도 강해서 에어컨 바람이 얼굴로 바로 오니까 자는 내내 이불을 얼굴에 뒤집어 쓰고 자야 했어요
그렇다고 끄고 자자니 이불 때문에 더워서 중간에 깨요

2. 엘리베이터 탈때 카드키를 찍고 층을 눌러야하는데, 카드키 인식이 잘 안 되서 항상 4번씩 찍어야 돼요. 다른 투숙객들도 그러더라고요

reviews.positives: مقابل مجمع iconsiam  بينهم مدخل .الفندق نظيف ولكن لايوجد من يحمل لك الحقائب.ما انصح به اذا كنت ناوي تسكن فيه وتروح وسط بانكوك مثل MBK  و Siam Paragon  وغيرهم بسبب الزحمه كون الفندق يقع في الجهة الاخرى من النهر .دايما الجسر لعبور النهر مزدحم طبعا لازم تاكسي.
reviews.negatives: الحقائب تشيلها بنفسك طبعا الريوق في عموما تايلند لايصلح للخليجين.من تحربه شخصيه في اكثر من فندق فخم في تايلند.يفضل الذهاب الى الكوفيات .

reviews.title: Neat and convenient accommodation.
reviews.text: The room is spacious and clean. Although it is small, there is a pool, and right next to the pool, there is a gym, so I enjoyed exercising and swimming quietly every morning. It is conveniently connected to Icon Siam (accessible through the entrance on the 2nd floor of Icon Siam), making shopping and dining easy. It is right next to the ICS shopping mall, which is great for calling a taxi. I recommend the Cream restaurant, which is a 5-minute walk away; it is tidy, affordable, and has good food.

reviews.title: Correct pour un court séjour
reviews.text: Chambre et salle de bain très petites. Manque d'espace. Caution obligatoire de 2000 baths remboursée entre 2 à 4 semaines après le séjour si paiement par carte, alors qu'il n'y a rien de particulier dans la chambre qui justifie une caution. Situation intéressante pour les achats, proximité immédiate du centre commercial ICONSIAM.
